markets.no_sub_title: Oswald Peraza: 5+
markets.rules_primary: If Oswald Peraza records 5+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Los Angeles A vs Houston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 4:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Oswald Peraza is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Oswald Peraza starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Oswald Peraza is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Oswald Peraza is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Oswald Peraza: 4+
markets.rules_primary: If Oswald Peraza records 4+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Los Angeles A vs Houston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 4:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Oswald Peraza is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Oswald Peraza starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Oswald Peraza is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Oswald Peraza is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Oswald Peraza: 3+
markets.rules_primary: If Oswald Peraza records 3+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Los Angeles A vs Houston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 4:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Oswald Peraza is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Oswald Peraza starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Oswald Peraza is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Oswald Peraza is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Oswald Peraza: 2+
markets.rules_primary: If Oswald Peraza records 2+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Los Angeles A vs Houston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 4:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Oswald Peraza is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Oswald Peraza starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Oswald Peraza is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Oswald Peraza is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Oswald Peraza: 1+
markets.rules_primary: If Oswald Peraza records 1+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Los Angeles A vs Houston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 4:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Oswald Peraza is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Oswald Peraza starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Oswald Peraza is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Oswald Peraza is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
